name: Funza Lushaka Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens, Grade 12 or enrolled in teaching degree
description: Covers tuition, accommodation, books and living allowance for students pursuing a teaching qualification at a public university.

name: NSFAS Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens, household income under R350,000
description: Government-funded financial aid covering tuition, accommodation, transport, books and personal allowance for qualifying students.

name: Sasol Bursary Programme
eligibility: SA citizens, Grade 12 with Maths & Science 70%+
description: Supports students in Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mining Engineering, and related STEM fields.

name: Allan Gray Orbis Foundation Fellowship
eligibility: SA citizens, strong academic record, entrepreneurial mindset
description: Prestigious fellowship for future entrepreneurs covering full tuition, accommodation, and a personal development programme.

name: Eskom Bursary Scheme
eligibility: SA citizens, Grade 12 with Maths 65%+ & Science 65%+
description: Bursary for Electrical, Mechanical, Civil, and Chemical Engineering students at approved South African universities.

name: Discovery Health Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens studying actuarial science, IT, or health sciences
description: Supports students in health sciences, actuarial science, data science, and IT fields relevant to healthcare innovation.

name: Nedbank Bursary Programme
eligibility: SA citizens, financial need, strong academics
description: Covers tuition and books for students pursuing degrees in Accounting, Finance, Economics, IT, and Data Science.

name: Anglo American Bursary
description: Mining, Metallurgical, Mechanical, Electrical, and Chemical Engineering bursaries with vacation work opportunities.

name: MTN SA Foundation Bursary
description: Supports students in Computer Science, Information Systems, Electrical Engineering, and related technology fields.

name: Old Mutual Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens, financial need, Grade 12 or enrolled
description: Bursary for Actuarial Science, Finance, Accounting, IT, and Mathematics students at South African universities.

name: Transnet Bursary Programme
description: Engineering and logistics bursaries including Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, and Industrial Engineering.

name: Shoprite Bursary
description: Supports students in Retail Management, Supply Chain, IT, Finance, and Food Technology programmes.

name: Department of Agriculture Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens, Grade 12 with Science subjects
description: Bursary for Agricultural Sciences, Veterinary Science, Food Science, and Environmental Management studies.

name: Vodacom Bursary
description: Technology-focused bursary for Computer Science, Data Science, Cybersecurity, and Telecommunications Engineering.

name: Standard Bank Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens, Grade 12 or enrolled, financial need
description: Supports students in Accounting, Finance, Economics, IT, Data Analytics, and Actuarial Science.

name: South African Breweries (SAB) Bursary
description: Bursary for Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Food Technology, and Supply Chain Management.

name: DHET TVET Bursary
eligibility: SA citizens enrolled at public TVET colleges
description: Government funding for TVET college students covering tuition, accommodation, transport, and learning materials.

name: Capitec Bursary Programme
eligibility: SA citizens, strong academic record in Maths
description: Supports students in Software Development, Data Engineering, Information Systems, and Applied Mathematics.
